_comment: PUBLIC Supabase config for the static site. The anon key is public by design (it already ships in the WhereTo app bundle) and is safe to commit — all access is gated by Row Level Security. The SERVICE-ROLE key must NEVER appear here or anywhere in this repo; it lives only in Supabase Edge Function secrets. These values are injected into window.WT_SUPABASE by layouts/base.njk.
